The '''''Eliall''-class Cargo Barge''' was a cargo hauler used by many shipping companies in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==Characteristics==
The [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] measured 100 meters in length and required one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and four other crew. It could carry up to 300 metric tons of cargo as well as five passengers.

{{Ship-stub}}
